hero.title: Turn Your Network into Income
hero.subtitle: Become a TeVra agent. No investment. No boss. No limits.

values.title: Your own business
values.desc: No boss, no schedule, no office. You manage your time and the growth of your client network with total freedom.

values.title: Zero investment
values.desc: The customer pays first. You risk no capital and need no physical stock. TeVra handles logistics.

values.title: No ceiling
values.desc: Earn 10–15% per sale. There are no limits on your commissions; you decide how much you want to earn each month.

vlapex.desc: The app that will let you manage orders and view commissions in real time. A digital command center designed for you to run your business from the palm of your hand. First agents will get priority access.

register.title: Join the TeVra Network
register.subtitle: Complete the registration process in 3 simple steps and an advisor will contact you for your initial interview.

hero.title: Your bridge to the United States
hero.subtitle: We are a legally registered company in California dedicated to the purchase, sale and distribution of technology and branded products from the USA to Latin America.

mission.title: Connecting Latin America with the best of the USA
mission.desc: To connect consumers and entrepreneurs in Latin America with original technology and branded products from the United States, through a reliable network of independent commercial agents, offering accessible prices, safe shipping and transparent service that creates value for everyone.
mission.quote: "In simple terms: we make it possible for anyone in Peru to buy products from the USA at fair prices, safely, through someone they trust."

vision.title: The largest import network in the Americas
vision.desc: To be the largest and most reliable import and distribution network between the United States and Latin America, powered by proprietary technology, where each agent has the opportunity to build their own business backed by a solid company in the USA.
vision.uber: Think of the Uber model, but for imports.
vision.uberDesc: Uber doesn't own cars — it connects drivers with passengers. TeVra connects local agents with the US market.

process.title: How the process works
process.subtitle: 7 simple steps from when your client orders to when they receive it at home.

steps.desc: A friend, family member, or follower tells you what they want: Nike, iPhone, perfume, brand clothing... any product available in US stores.
You give them the price (product + your commission + shipping). If they agree, the customer pays you directly. They are YOUR client, not TeVra's.

steps.titulo: You report the order to TeVra
steps.desc: You send us the details: product, size/color/model and proof of payment. We handle everything else.
We go to the store, outlet or wholesale supplier and purchase exactly what your client ordered. We take a photo as proof.
The product goes to our logistics partner in Miami. They load it on the next flight to Peru, 2 departures per week. Travels insured.

steps.titulo: Arrives in Peru and clears customs
steps.desc: Our logistics partner has an office in Lima and handles customs clearance. You don't deal with customs or SUNAT.
The product arrives at the Lima office. You pick it up and deliver it. Order complete. Estimated time: 5 to 10 business days.

advantages.title: Advantages of the TeVra model
advantages.subtitle: What sets us apart from any other courier or personal shopper.

items.desc: We work with a logistics partner in Miami with their own licenses to ship cargo. No intermediaries — we go straight to the source.

items.titulo: Two hubs in the United States
items.desc: We operate from California and Miami. We always look for the best available price on both coasts for your client.
TeVra is an LLC registered in California with a federal EIN. We are not informal — this gives confidence to you and your clients.
Every shipment travels with cargo insurance. If anything is lost or damaged, it's covered. Your reputation and the client's are protected.
Our partner has 12+ years handling Peruvian customs. They handle the entire clearance process. You don't process anything.
Everything we sell is new, sealed and factory original. No replicas, no second-hand. Quality is our priority.

challenges.title: Challenges you should know about
challenges.subtitle: We don't paint a perfect world. Every business has challenges and we want you to know them before you start.

items.desc: The estimate is 5–10 business days, but it can extend due to flight delays, physical customs inspection, or holidays. We always communicate the status.

items.titulo: Not all products can be shipped
items.desc: Flammable liquids, loose lithium batteries, perishable food items and products requiring special homologation have restrictions. Check before ordering.
TeVra provides infrastructure and backing, but you find the clients. If you don't move, you don't sell. It's an opportunity, not a guaranteed income.
Your client trusts you with their money. That trust is sacred. Every cent must be handled with complete transparency and seriousness.

timeline.statesSubtitle: This is how your product travels from the USA to your door.

states.label: Order confirmed
states.sub: Payment received — TeVra is processing the purchase in the USA

states.label: Product purchased
states.sub: Your product was purchased and is in Miami ready to ship

states.label: In transit
states.sub: Your product is on a flight to Peru — departing from Miami

states.label: In customs
states.sub: Your product has arrived in Peru and is being cleared through customs

states.label: Ready for delivery
states.sub: Your product was cleared — coordinate pickup with your agent

states.label: Delivered
states.sub: Order successfully completed — Thank you for your purchase!
